description.value: Years of playing skitterspree trained you for a special move. You curl up into a tightly wound ball, and an adjacent ally with a free hand that's at least one size larger than you can use a reaction to attempt a ranged Strike with your body as an unarmed attack that deals @Damage[1d10[bludgeoning]] damage for the duration of the Strike. This unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group and has the agile, analog, brutal, and thrown (20 feet) traits. This unarmed attack gains the benefits of your worn hardlight handwraps. You land adjacent to the target, but you land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone] if the Strike is a critical failure.
